page_metadata.biotools__summary: Blast2Fish is a reference-based annotation web tool for transcriptome analysis of non-model teleost fish. It is a novel approach for performing functional enrichment analysis on non-model teleost fish transcriptome data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Blast2Fish is a reference-based annotation web tool for transcriptome analysis of non-model teleost fish. It is a novel approach for performing functional enrichment analysis on non-model teleost fish transcriptome data.
